title: Workflow Verification Result
description: Pass/fail outcome from a deterministic verification step (verify_output, validate_analysis) or generic schema-check tools such as text.validate_schema. Embedded in client results as meta.verification. Not used by validate_priority_fixes.

valid.description: Whether the checked object passed verification

errors.description: Human-readable verification failures when valid is false

warnings.description: Optional non-blocking verification warnings (not emitted by current producers)
